indicators.name: several dining tables
indicators.rationale: Dining tables are not suitable for computer work due to their height and lack of ergonomics.

indicators.name: several chairs
indicators.rationale: Chairs are not suitable for computer work due to their height and lack of ergonomics.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height for setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: No chairs or seating options are designed for ergonomic support.

indicators.name: no dedicated lighting
indicators.rationale: There is no task lighting available for screen work.

indicators.name: no dedicated layout
indicators.rationale: The layout is open and lacks a dedicated workspace area.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The presence of several dining tables and chairs makes it difficult to set up a comfortable and ergonomic workstation. There is no flat personal work surface or dedicated lighting, and the layout is open and lacks a dedicated workspace area. However, the presence of some plants and lighting fixtures suggests some attempt at creating a pleasant environment, which slightly elevates the score.
